LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KEITH BROWN'S MOTION TO STRIKE; DEMURRER TO ANSWER OF THE T.J.X. COMPANIES, INC. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED. T.J.X. HAS THE RIGHT TO DEFEND THE ACTION. DEMURRER TO THE ANSWER IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE FOLLOWING DEFENSES WHICH REQUIRE THE PLEADING OF FACTS. 5 WITKIN, CAL. PROC. 2D (4TH ED.) PLEADING SECTION 1008: 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, AND 17. TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IS GRANTED. OVERRULED AS TO 1, 2, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15 AND 16. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND 18 AND 19. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

THE MOTION TO QUASH IS DENIED. THE MOTION TO MODIFY IS GRANTED. MODIFICATION. THAT COURT WILL CONDUCT IN CAMERA REVIEW OF EVALUATIONS AND DISCIPLINARY RECORDS. ALL REQUESTS FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE CHAN. NOT REPORTED.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

Off Calendar Dec-29-2008 Off Calendar

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2008 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoenas Directed To Shoe Pavillion, Inc.
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Barbara Figari, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Keith Brown
Althea Bovell, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: TJX Companies, Inc.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted with modification. Plaintiff Keith Brown's motion to quash or modify the subpoena to Shoe Pavilion Inc. is granted in part and denied in part. The motion to quash is denied. The motion to modify is granted. The subpoena is modified to not require production of any performance evaluations and records of disciplinary action. The deponent shall produce the other records specified in the subpoena.
MODIFICATION. That Court will conduct in camera review of evaluations and disciplinary records.
All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike; Demurrer To Answer Of The Tjx Companies, Inc.
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF KEITH BROWN'S MOTION TO STRIKE; DEMURRER TO ANSWER OF THE T.J.X. COMPANIES, INC.
APPEARANCES: BARBARA FIGARI, ESQUIRE (LAW OFFICES OF MICHAEL HUFFMAN, 415.362.1111) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ALTHEA BOVELL, ESQUIRE (SEYFARTH SHAW, 415.544.1061) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED. T.J.X. HAS THE RIGHT TO DEFEND THE ACTION. DEMURRER TO THE ANSWER IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE FOLLOWING DEFENSES WHICH REQUIRE THE PLEADING OF FACTS. 5 WITKIN, CAL. PROC. 2D (4TH ED.) PLEADING SECTION 1008: 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, AND 17. TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IS GRANTED. OVERRULED AS TO 1, 2, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15 AND 16. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND 18 AND 19. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. 302/PJM/X-MS) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
